usage: report_cppr [-help] [-check_type {setup hold clock_gating_setup clock_gating_hold clock_gating_pulse_width data_setup data_hold recovery removal pulse_width clock_period clock_separation skew no_change_setup no_change_hold time_borrow}] -from <pin_or_port> [-from_clock <clkname>] -to <pin_or_port> [-to_clock <clkname>] [-view <view_name>] [ [ > | >> ] ] [-early  | -late ]

options.name: -check_type
options.description: {setup hold clock_gating_setup clock_gating_hold clock_gating_pulse_width data_setup data_hold recovery removal pulse_width clock_period clock_separation skew no_change_setup no_change_hold time_borrow} Reports only the cppr for the paths that end at the specified timing check

options.name: -from
options.description: Specifies clock pin of the source flop, or port

options.name: -to
options.description: Specifies clock pin of the destination flop, or port

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies analysis view (string, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to the specified file
